name: Usawoti Ojwayelekile (0.9% NaCl)
description: I-Isotonic crystalloid fluid. Isetshenziselwa i-IV fluid resuscitation. Lapho ushaqeka okopha, sebenzisa ngokucophelela -- amavolumu amakhulu enza i-coagulopathy ibe yimbi kakhulu (hyperchloremic acidosis, dilutional coagulopathy). I-permissive hypotension ikhethwa ekuhlukumezekeni okungena ngaphakathi kusalindwe ukulawula ukopha.
dose: Ukushaqeka ukopha: Umkhawulo ku-1L ubukhulu kusalindile ukulawulwa ukopha (permissive hypotension). Ithagethi ye-SBP 80-90 mmHg ekuhlukumezekeni okungenayo, 90 mmHg ku-TBI. I-Non-hemorrhagic hypovolemia: 500 mL boluses, phinda uhlole.
warnings: Umthamo omkhulu udala i-hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis kanye ne-dilutional coagulopathy -- yenza kube kubi kakhulu u-triad obulalayo ekuhlukumezekeni.
I-Lactated Ringer's (LR) ikhethwa ekuvuseleleni ukuhlukumezeka kwevolumu enkulu.
UNGAVUMI ukuvuselela ngokweqile ukuhlukumezeka kwe-torso okungena ngaphakathi ngaphambi kokulawula ukopha kokuhlinzwa (i-permissive hypotension).

pediatric.dose: 20 mL/kg IV bolus, phinda uhlole. Phinda ubuningi x3 (60 mL/kg isiyonke) ngaphambi kokucabangela imikhiqizo yegazi.

obstetric.note: Ukuvuselelwa okujwayelekile ekopheni kwe-obstetric. Ukuvuselela uketshezi olunamandla olufanele ukopha kwangemva kokubeletha ngaphambi kokuba kutholakale imikhiqizo yegazi.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS
